subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Render thanks unto thy Lord, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto His presence and remained faithful to His Covenant, and hearkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله فاشکری ربک بما حضرت تلقاء الوجه و وفیت بمیثاق ربک و سمعت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for women
